name: Patient 8
history: Past sexual assault by partner Ivan. Ongoing relationship difficulties with trust and intimacy. Some improvement with Ivan's efforts.
worthless_belief: I am bad - dangerous, toxic, evil
intermediate_belief: My body is not my own; I can't trust my reactions.
intermediate_belief_depression: The assault ruined me for normal relationships forever.
situation: Ivan touches the patient in a way that reminds her of the past assault.
auto_thought: "It's happening again. I can't move. I deserve this."
behavior: Freezes, then pushes Ivan away violently, retreats to bathroom to cry.
